app_metadata.description: Self-hosted video platform and federated video streaming server.
app_metadata.name: peertube

run_as_context.description: Container [peertube] can run as any non-root user and group.
Container [postgres] runs as non-root user and group.
Container [redis] can run as any non-root user and group.

app_metadata.title: PeerTube

groups.name: User and Group Configuration
groups.description: Configure User and Group for PeerTube

attrs.label: Postgres Image (CAUTION)
attrs.description:
If you are changing this after the postgres directory has been initialized,</br>
STOP! and make sure you have a backup of your data.</br>
Changing this will trigger an one way database upgrade.</br>
You can only select newer versions of postgres.</br>
Selecting an older version will refuse to start.</br>
If something goes wrong, you will have to restore from backup.

enum.description: Postgres 18

attrs.label: Database Password
attrs.description: The password for the PeerTube database.

attrs.label: Redis Password
attrs.description: The password for the Redis cache.

attrs.label: PeerTube Secret
attrs.description:
A long random string used as the application secret.</br>
Used for signing tokens and encrypting data.</br>
Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

attrs.label: Admin Email
attrs.description:
The email address for the initial admin account.</br>
This cannot be changed after the first startup.

attrs.label: Initial Root Password
attrs.description:
The password for the initial root account.</br>
This cannot be changed after the first startup.

attrs.label: Webserver Hostname
attrs.description:
The domain name where PeerTube will be accessible.</br>
Do not include http:// or https://.</br>
Example: peertube.example.com</br>
WARNING: This cannot be changed after PeerTube is initialized.

attrs.label: Webserver Port
attrs.description:
The public port where PeerTube is accessible.</br>
If behind a reverse proxy on port 443, set to 443.

attrs.label: Webserver HTTPS
attrs.description:
Set to true if PeerTube is served over HTTPS.</br>
This affects how links and embeds are generated.

attrs.label: User ID
attrs.description: The user id that PeerTube files will be owned by.

attrs.label: Group ID
attrs.description: The group id that PeerTube files will be owned by.

attrs.label: Port Bind Mode
attrs.description:
The port bind mode.</br>
- Publish: The port will be published on the host for external access.</br>
- Expose: The port will be exposed for inter-container communication.</br>
- None: The port will not be exposed or published.</br>
Note: If the Dockerfile defines an EXPOSE directive,
the port will still be exposed for inter-container communication regardless of this setting.

enum.description: Publish port on the host for external access
Expose port for inter-container communication
None

attrs.label: Host IPs
attrs.description: IPs on the host to bind this port

attrs.label: Port Bind Mode
attrs.description:
The port bind mode.</br>
- Publish: The port will be published on the host for external access.</br>
- Expose: The port will be exposed for inter-container communication.</br>
- None: The port will not be exposed or published.</br>
Note: If the Dockerfile defines an EXPOSE directive,
the port will still be exposed for inter-container communication regardless of this setting.

enum.description: Publish port on the host for external access
Expose port for inter-container communication
None

attrs.label: Host IPs
attrs.description: IPs on the host to bind this port

attrs.label: Name
attrs.description:
The name of the network to join.</br>
The network must already exist.

attrs.label: Containers
attrs.description: The containers to add to this network.

attrs.label: Gateway Priority (Optional)
attrs.description: Indicates the priority of the gateway for this network interface.

attrs.label: Priority (Optional)
attrs.description: Indicates in which order Compose connects the service’s containers to its networks.

attrs.label: Automatic Permissions
attrs.description:
Automatically set permissions for the host path.
Enabling this, will check the top level directory,</br>
If it finds incorrect permissions, it will `chown` the
host path to the user and group required for the
postgres container.

attrs.label: Type
attrs.description:
ixVolume: Is dataset created automatically by the system.</br>
Host Path: Is a path that already exists on the system.</br>
SMB Share: Is a SMB share that is mounted to as a volume.</br>
NFS Share: Is a NFS share that is mounted to as a volume.

enum.description: Host Path (Path that already exists on the system)
ixVolume (Dataset created automatically by the system)
SMB/CIFS Share (Mounts a volume to a SMB share)
NFS Share (Mounts a volume to a NFS share)

PeerTube

PeerTube is a free, decentralized, and federated video platform.
